summary: The major aims are ensuring patient safety by determining dose tolerance levels while also gathering preliminary data necessary for further development stages focusing primarily on effectiveness rather than just initial testing parameters such as toxicity or side effects alone. Phase I studies prioritize establishing a safe dosage range before moving onto more extensive investigations aimed at evaluating treatment outcomes directly related to disease management goals post-approval if applicable based upon regulatory requirements set forth during preclinical research periods leading up these pivotal human experiments designed specifically under strict ethical
